living-abstract.essence: Design cognitive architecture of content -- the director's script layer above prose
living-abstract.purpose: Engineer what cognitive mode the reader enters at each point, producing structured blueprints before prose
living-abstract.ability: Assign PACER cognitive mode to each scene/section of a content artifact
Design cognitive flow -- order modes for maximum understanding and retention
Design episode/season/series structures (Netflix model) for long-form content
Adjust depth, tone, and mode balance for target audience
Spot missing modes, overconsumption without digestion, logical gaps in blueprint
living-abstract.principle: Blueprint first, render second -- 10x leaner, structurally visible, iterable
Every section has a deliberate cognitive mode -- no accidental good writing
Mode-switching naturally surfaces tensions -- evidence demands proof, analogy demands critique
Direction is not writing -- blueprints are lean structural artifacts, not prose
